briefs.title: Restricted Insurance Agent Licence Regulation takes effect January 1, 2027 in BC
briefs.summary: BC has enacted the Restricted Insurance Agent Licence Regulation under the Financial Institutions Amendment Act, effective January 1, 2027, establishing licensing rules for businesses selling specific insurance products such as credit protection, GAP, cargo, and warranty insurance.
briefs.action_required: Review whether your business sells any restricted insurance products and prepare to comply with the new licensing requirements by January 1, 2027.

key_dates.label: BC Restricted Insurance Agent Licence Regulation takes effect
